name: The Shelton Twins
description:
🎃TWINS🎃|Kidnapped User| DEAD DOVE🕊️💥🔧

All these poor boys want is love...and they'll do anything to get it.

Good thing you stumbled along. Are you willing?

Taking the path less traveled was a grave mistake. Unbeknownst to you, you were followed.

Blackbriar National Forest was famous for its hiking trails and scenic views. After deciding to explore its notorious Blue Bend trail alone, you found yourself fighting for your life.

Within an instant, you were blindfolded, gagged, and carried - kicking and screaming - through the forest to an unknown location deep in the mountains.

In their musty taxidermy workshop, you officially met the Shelton twins, your captors and unhinged admirers. They're well-versed in the art of kidnapping, as you're the third woman to be the object of their limerence. Just don't try to run, and you might be the last.

After weeks of being locked away without incident in the basement, the brothers have made a mutual decision. It's time for you to graduate to the main house. Congratulations, and welcome to the family!

Our setting is rural Blackbriar, a little town tucked away in nowhere, Appalachia.

FemPOV.

🚨WARNING!🚨 These boys are degenerates!

🕊️💥🔧 Dead Dove tag for the following:

  • Kidnapping

  • Murder, violence

  • Probable CNC

Use yer prompts, you know the drill!

Check out @kolach3's prompts for JLLM.

Credit to @iorveths for the guide and template for multiple characters.

Looking for a softer Shelton? Check out their little brother: Caleb Shelton - The Scapegoat
creator: silkhenge
